rationale: The citing paper references Khan and Dhar (2006) only once, in a grouped parenthetical citation with Fishbach and Dhar (2005) and Wilcox et al. (2009), to illustrate a possible licensing backfire from item-level traffic-light labels. The study does not build its hypotheses, methods, or analyses around this specific paper; its empirical focus is on dynamic meal-level feedback and revision behavior. Because the citation serves as broad background support rather than a distinct conceptual or methodological basis, this is mention-only.
